src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Replace deprecated `RegistryManager` with the newer `RegistryClient` from the updated Azure IoT SDK.
Replace deprecated `DeviceTwin` with the newer `TwinClient` from the updated Azure IoT SDK.
Update Device creation to use the new SDK constructor instead of the static factory method.
Update Twin tag manipulation to use the new SDK's Twin object and patch method.
Remove dependency on Google Guava by replacing `Lists.newArrayList()` with standard `ArrayList`.
Remove dependency on Google Gson as it is no longer required for exception handling in the new SDK flow.
Remove Spring `@Component` and `@Autowired` annotations, likely moving to manual bean configuration or a different DI strategy.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.human_impl: Removed @Component and @Autowired from class and constructor.

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Update logger initialization to use `MethodHandles.lookup()` for better performance and class resolution in newer Java versions.
Change error handling from silent logging to throwing custom exceptions for critical operations.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.human_impl: catch (Exception e) { LOG.error(...) } -> throw new IotDeviceProviderException(...)

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Add a new method to explicitly check if a device exists in the registry.
Add a new method to log registry statistics using the new SDK capabilities.
Refactor device query logic to support optional tag filtering and use the new SDK query response object.
Replace manual HTTP calls using RestTemplate with a dedicated LiveObjects SDK client (LoAdapter) for sending commands.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.human_impl: Removed RestTemplate and HttpHeaders; added LoAdapter dependency and call loAdapter.sendCommand().

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Introduce Jackson ObjectMapper to deserialize the raw command string into a structured CommandAddRequest object before sending.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.human_impl: Added ObjectMapper dependency and used objectMapper.readValue(command, CommandAddRequest.class).

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Wrap the command sending logic with Failsafe library to implement retry policies and fallback handling.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.human_impl: Added Failsafe.with(objectFallback, commandRetryPolicy).run(...) around the send logic.

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Change the send method return type from void to IotHubMessageResult to indicate success or rejection status.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.human_impl: Changed public void send(...) to public IotHubMessageResult send(...) and return COMPLETE/REJECT.

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Replace implicit or missing logging with explicit SLF4J logger for error tracking.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.human_impl: Added private static final Logger LOG and LOG.error() call in catch block.

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Add standard copyright and license header to the source file.
src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.human_impl: Added block comment with Orange copyright and MIT license reference at top of file.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.1.8 to 3.2.3 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Update the target Java version property from 1.8 to 21.
Add JitPack repository to resolve the new FIFO SDK dependency.
Add the new FIFO_SDK_LiveObjects dependency required for the updated integration logic.
Upgrade Azure IoT Service Client from 1.18.0 to 2.1.7 to align with newer Azure SDK standards.
Remove spring-integration-mqtt dependency, likely replaced by the new FIFO SDK or other mechanisms.
Remove explicit Guava dependency, relying on transitive dependencies or removing usage.
Remove azure-eventhubs dependency, possibly migrated to a different event handling strategy.
Upgrade Azure IoT Device Client from 1.18.0 to 2.4.1 for compatibility and new features.
Upgrade Application Insights Spring Boot Starter from 2.5.1 to 2.6.4.
Upgrade Azure Spring Boot Metrics Starter from 2.2.1 to 2.3.5.
Add spring-integration-jmx dependency for JMX monitoring support.
Add maven-model dependency, likely for runtime POM parsing or configuration handling.
Add Apache Commons Text dependency for string manipulation utilities.
Add Jodah Failsafe dependency for retry and circuit breaker patterns.
Add ArchUnit dependencies for architecture testing in the test scope.
Add ArchUnit JUnit 5 integration for architecture testing.
Add maven-release-plugin to automate release processes with SCM integration.
Remove azure-webapp-maven-plugin, likely shifting deployment strategy away from direct Azure Web App deployment via Maven.
Add SCM configuration to support release plugin and version tagging.
Add a release profile with appassembler-maven-plugin to create distributable archives excluding config files.

.gitignore.general_idea: Added application-dev.yml to gitignore to prevent committing local development configuration.
Added /temp/ directory to gitignore to exclude temporary files from version control.

LICENSE.general_idea: Update the copyright holder in the license file from 'Live Objects' to 'Orange'.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Refactor application configuration from flat single-tenant structure to a hierarchical multi-tenant list supporting multiple Azure IoT Hubs per LiveObjects tenant.
src/main/resources/application.yml.human_impl: Replaced flat 'lo' and 'azure' keys with 'tenant-list' containing 'live-objects-properties' and 'azure-iot-hub-list'.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Introduce configuration properties for device synchronization intervals and persistence directories required by new synchronization logic.
Add configuration parameters for connection status monitoring, session reestablishment, and message handling resilience.
Enable Spring Boot Actuator management endpoints and health checks for better observability in the newer Spring Boot version.
Configure metrics export to Azure Monitor using the newer Spring Boot Actuator integration.
Simplify Application Insights configuration by removing legacy channel settings likely deprecated or handled automatically in newer SDKs.
src/main/resources/application.yml.human_impl: Removed 'channel.in-process' settings and added 'enabled: true' under 'azure.application-insights'.

src/main/resources/logback.xml.general_idea: Adds a standard copyright and license header comment block to the configuration file.
Enables automatic reloading of the logback configuration file when it changes.
Adds a rolling file appender for INFO level logs to persist them to disk.
Adds a rolling file appender for all log levels to persist comprehensive logs to disk.
Configures logging level for the Eclipse Paho MQTT client library.
Configures logging level for the Apache QPID Proton library.
Configures logging level for Proton trace messages.
References the new file appenders in the root logger to activate file logging.
